data.title: ticket-lib-api: stale RED marker [test_ticket_tag_via_library] covers implemented tests in .test-index
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: .test-index entries for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket and plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh have stale RED marker [test_ticket_tag_via_library]. Tests 9-11 (ticket_link, ticket_list, ticket_transition) are implemented and appear after this marker, causing the test gate to tolerate their failures.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
Category: verification
